title: 07481_Position_A_Safe_Harbor_for_AI_Evaluation_and_Red_Teaming
positive_examples: Fostering wider participation in AI evaluation will require firms to remove disincentives and favoritism in researcher access.
Implementation of safe harbors would likely shape future interactions between AI safety researchers and generative AI companies positively, leading to more mature guardrails around AI systems.
negative_examples: Malicious actors might take advantage of vulnerabilities publicly shared by researchers if companies are unable to patch fixes within the disclosure window.
Malicious actors might try to abuse the safe harbor protections for their own misconduct.
